name: @omnidotdev/livestream
description: Shared LiveKit live-streaming core for the Omni ecosystem: neutral server room/token helpers and client broadcaster/viewer components. App-specific access control, persistence, and chat are injected, so the core stays reusable across products.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/server/index.ts --outdir ./build/server --target node --external livekit-server-sdk && bun build ./src/client/index.tsx --outdir ./build/client --external react --external react/jsx-runtime --external react-dom --external '@livekit/components-react' --external '@livekit/components-styles' --external livekit-client && tsc
